rules.title: Three clinic types frequently appear in APCD and claims analysis
rules.body: Key differences are in how they are funded, how they are identified in claims, and what services they provide.

identification: Provider NPI belongs to the clinic — not a person
Often also identifiable by type of bill = '77'

taxonomy_cards.services: Prenatal care, immunizations, family planning. Some in-house treatments — not prescriptions.
identification: County CANNOT be determined from claims — use member's county of residence
notes: County must be assigned from member residence, not from claims data

taxonomy_cards.full_name: Area Health Education Center / UAMS Regional Campus
